60秒任务: 「解释误会」：拒绝/边界/误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 委婉表达｜误会修复｜情绪支持｜边界｜关系维护｜隐含意图
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I think there’s been a misunderstanding.（指出误会）
That’s not what I meant.（澄清意思）
I may not have explained it clearly.（承担表达责任）
I didn’t mean to make it sound like ___.（修正语气）
Let me put it another way.（换种说法）
I can see why it came across that way.（理解对方感受）
What I was trying to say was ___.（说明本意）
I wasn’t blaming you.（消除指责感）
I should have been clearer.（承认不清楚）
Could we start that part again?（重启对话）
I hear what you’re saying.（确认理解）
Thanks for telling me how it felt.（回应感受）
Let’s not make this bigger than it is.（降温）
I’m sorry for the confusion.（道歉）
Are we okay now?（确认关系）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: misunderstanding, tone, message, comment, joke, context, blame, confusion
Verbs: mean, explain, clarify, hear, assume, blame, apologize, restart
Adjectives / Tone: clear, awkward, defensive, upset, confused, direct
Time / Place: earlier, last night, at dinner, in the chat, in front of others
Chunks: came across, not what I meant, put it another way, start again, sorry for the confusion
